lots.title: 18th Century Oak Writing Desk
lots.description: A beautifully preserved writing desk with original brass handles and carved legs. Minor wear consistent with age.

lots.title: Art Deco Walnut Sideboard
lots.description: Stunning 1930s sideboard with geometric inlay and original chrome handles. Excellent condition.

lots.title: Louis XVI Gilt Bergère Armchair
lots.description: French armchair with original carved gilt frame and later silk upholstery in pale blue. Paris, circa 1780.

lots.title: Victorian Mahogany Bookcase
lots.description: Large breakfront bookcase with adjustable shelves and glazed upper doors. England, circa 1860.

lots.title: Biedermeier Cherry Wood Secretaire
lots.description: Elegant early 19th century secretaire with fitted interior and ebonised mounts. Vienna, circa 1820.

lots.title: Mid-Century Teak Dining Table
lots.description: Scandinavian modern dining table with six matching chairs. Denmark, 1960s. Original finish.

lots.title: Oil on Canvas — Coastal Landscape
lots.description: Atmospheric seascape depicting rocky coastline at dusk. Signed lower right. Swedish school, early 20th century.

lots.title: Watercolour — Market Scene, Marrakech
lots.description: Vivid watercolour by British Orientalist painter. Signed and dated 1923. Framed.

lots.title: Abstract Expressionist Print
lots.description: Limited edition screenprint, 14/50. Signed by the artist. New York, 1978.

lots.title: Impressionist Still Life — Flowers
lots.description: Oil on board depicting mixed flowers in a ceramic vase. French school, circa 1900. Gilt frame.

lots.title: Charcoal Portrait Study
lots.description: Expressive portrait study of a young woman, signed and dated Berlin 1934. Mounted and framed.

lots.title: Contemporary Mixed Media Triptych
lots.description: Three-panel mixed media work on paper. Spanish artist, 2018. Provenance: private collection, Madrid.

lots.title: Art Nouveau Diamond Brooch
lots.description: 18ct gold brooch set with old-cut diamonds and enamel detail. French maker's mark, circa 1905.

lots.title: Victorian Pearl and Ruby Necklace
lots.description: Natural freshwater pearls interspersed with ruby rondelles. Yellow gold clasp. England, circa 1880.

lots.title: Sapphire and Diamond Cocktail Ring
lots.description: Platinum ring set with a central oval sapphire of approximately 3.2ct, surrounded by brilliant-cut diamonds.

lots.title: Scandinavian Silver Brooch by Georg Jensen
lots.description: Sterling silver brooch with amber stone, design no. 11. Stamped with Georg Jensen hallmarks. Denmark, 1940s.

lots.title: Emerald and Gold Pendant
lots.description: 18ct yellow gold pendant set with a Colombian emerald of approximately 1.8ct. Accompanied by gemmological report.

lots.title: Rolex Submariner Ref. 5513
lots.description: Stainless steel diver's watch, matte dial, circa 1978. Unpolished case. Original bracelet. Service history available.

lots.title: Patek Philippe Calatrava Ref. 5196
lots.description: 18ct white gold dress watch with silvered dial. Purchased 2014, full set including box and papers.

lots.title: Omega Speedmaster Professional Moonwatch
lots.description: Stainless steel chronograph, Ref. 145.022, circa 1969. Tritium dial. Hesalite crystal. Good original condition.

lots.title: Cartier Tank Américaine, 18ct Gold
lots.description: Ladies Tank Américaine with diamond-set bezel. Quartz movement. Box and papers, purchased Paris 2008.

lots.title: Breitling Navitimer Ref. 806
lots.description: Stainless steel pilot's chronograph with slide rule bezel. Venus 178 movement. Circa 1960. Fully serviced.

lots.title: Meissen Porcelain Tureen and Cover
lots.description: Large soup tureen with crossed swords mark. Blue onion pattern. Germany, 18th century. Minor restoration to lid.

lots.title: Royal Copenhagen Flora Danica Plate
lots.description: Botanical specimen plate from the Flora Danica service. Hand-painted. Denmark, 20th century production.

lots.title: Studio Pottery Vase by Lucie Rie
lots.description: Stoneware vase with inlaid decoration and bronze manganese glaze. Signed. London, circa 1970.

lots.title: Sèvres Porcelain Inkstand
lots.description: Gilt and cobalt blue inkstand with two covered wells. Interlaced L marks. France, circa 1765.

lots.title: Italian Maiolica Apothecary Jar
lots.description: Istoriato-decorated wet drug jar with Latin inscription. Central Italy, 16th century. Provenance: private Italian collection.

lots.title: George III Silver Epergne
lots.description: Large centrepiece with four removable baskets. London 1784, maker's mark T.P. Weight approximately 1,850g.

lots.title: Swedish Silver Coffee Service
lots.description: Three-piece coffee service comprising pot, cream jug and sugar bowl. Stockholm 1910, maker GAB. Total weight 890g.

lots.title: German Silver-Gilt Standing Cup
lots.description: Parcel-gilt cup and cover with embossed figural decoration. Augsburg, circa 1620. Museum-quality condition.

lots.title: Illuminated Book of Hours, circa 1440
lots.description: Flemish manuscript on vellum, 184 leaves, eight full-page miniatures. Original binding with brass clasps.

lots.title: First Edition — Hemingway, A Farewell to Arms
lots.description: First edition, first issue. New York, 1929. Original cloth, light fading to spine. Very good condition overall.

lots.title: Swedish Royal Proclamation, 1756
lots.description: Handwritten and signed royal decree on vellum. Stamped with royal seal. Historical provenance documented.

lots.title: Hermès Kelly 32 in Togo Leather
lots.description: Rouge Garance Kelly 32 with gold hardware. Includes original box, dust bag, and clochette. Excellent condition.

lots.title: Chanel 2.55 Reissue in Black Lambskin
lots.description: Classic 2.55 reissue, size 226. Aged gold hardware. Purchased from Chanel Bond Street 2019. Full set.

lots.title: Vintage Valentino Couture Evening Gown
lots.description: Red silk taffeta ball gown, Italian size 40. Labelled Valentino Couture Roma. Circa 1985. Unworn condition.

lots.title: Louis Vuitton Speedy 30 Monogram
lots.description: Classic Speedy 30 in monogram canvas with natural leather trim. Includes padlock, keys, and dust bag. Good condition.

lots.title: Steiff Teddy Bear, circa 1910
lots.description: Early mohair bear with button in ear, hump back and boot-button eyes. 38cm. Some wear, all original.

lots.title: Dinky Toys — Pre-War Collection
lots.description: Lot of 12 pre-war Dinky vehicles in original boxes. England, 1930s. Good to very good condition throughout.

lots.title: LEGO Technic 8880 Super Car, 1994
lots.description: Complete and unbuilt LEGO Technic 8880 set in original sealed box. Factory sealed. Rare in this condition.

lots.title: Antique Persian Tabriz Carpet
lots.description: Fine wool and silk carpet with hunting design on ivory ground. Iran, circa 1900. 420 x 310 cm. Good condition.

lots.title: Flemish Tapestry Fragment, 17th Century
lots.description: Wool and silk tapestry depicting woodland scene with figures. 180 x 240 cm. Some restoration, colours vibrant.

lots.title: Vintage Kantha Quilt, Bengal
lots.description: Hand-stitched cotton quilt with narrative embroidery. West Bengal, early 20th century. 180 x 200 cm.

lots.title: Bronze Figure of a Dancer
lots.description: Lost-wax cast bronze, signed and numbered 4/8. Contemporary Swedish sculptor. Height 42cm. Certificate included.

lots.title: Marble Bust of a Roman Emperor
lots.description: White Carrara marble bust on later socle. Italy, 18th century. Height without socle 48cm.

lots.title: Cast Iron Garden Greyhound, Pair
lots.description: Pair of recumbent greyhounds on rectangular bases. England, Victorian. Height 38cm, length 62cm. Original paint.

lots.title: Château Pétrus 1995, 3 Bottles
lots.description: Three bottles of Château Pétrus, Pomerol 1995. Stored professionally since release. Labels excellent.

lots.title: Macallan 30 Year Old Sherry Oak, Bottled 2002
lots.description: Single malt Scotch whisky, 43% ABV. Original presentation box. Level: upper shoulder. Seal intact.

lots.title: Armagnac Domaine de Jouanda 1962
lots.description: Vintage Armagnac, bottled 1990. 70cl, 42% ABV. Original tissue and wooden case. France.

lots.title: Swedish Gold Coin — Gustav III, 1777
lots.description: Gold ducat, Stockholm mint, 1777. Very fine condition. Rare issue with original lustre.

lots.title: Roman Gold Aureus — Emperor Hadrian
lots.description: Gold aureus, Rome mint, circa 125 AD. Obverse: laureate portrait. Reverse: standing Roma. Near mint state.

lots.title: US $1000 Federal Reserve Note, 1934
lots.description: Series 1934 $1000 bill, Federal Reserve Bank of New York. Fine condition. Rare large denomination note.

lots.title: Chinese Blue and White Vase, Qianlong Period
lots.description: Porcelain vase with landscape decoration. Six-character Qianlong mark and of the period. Height 38cm.

lots.title: Japanese Woodblock Print by Hiroshige
lots.description: Oban yoko-e landscape from the series 'Sixty-nine Stations of the Kisokaido'. Circa 1840. Good impression.

lots.title: Tibetan Thangka — Green Tara
lots.description: Mineral pigment on cotton. Tibet, 18th century. Original silk brocade border. 65 x 45cm (image).

lots.title: Ansel Adams — Moonrise, Hernandez, New Mexico (signed)
lots.description: Gelatin silver print, 1941/printed later. Signed in pencil. 38 x 48cm. Framed. Provenance: private US collection.

lots.title: Helmut Newton — Big Nude V, Paris 1980
lots.description: Gelatin silver print, vintage. Signed and stamped. Edition 3/10. 60 x 50cm. Accompanied by certificate.

lots.title: Tiffany Studios Wisteria Table Lamp
lots.description: Leaded glass and patinated bronze lamp. New York, circa 1905. Shade diameter 56cm. Total height 68cm.

lots.title: Murano Glass Chandelier, Mid-Century
lots.description: Twelve-arm chandelier with hand-blown flowers and leaves in amber and clear glass. Italy, 1950s.

lots.title: Arts & Crafts Copper Oil Lamp
lots.description: Hammered copper lamp with original green slag glass shade. England, circa 1905. Converted to electricity.
